Description of the type of element

column2: Element (node or field) is obligatory (e.g. NIP in the element Entity1/Identification Data); the obligatory nature of a given field results in particular from the content of the applicable provisions of the Act and is conditioned by the logical structure of the formula
Element is oligatory if the node is provided (if the node is not provided then there is no such field) , eg email address is obligatory if the connectionDetails node is provided
Entries are made obligatory if a statutory condition is met (e.g. P_11A in the Fa/FaRow element); filling in the field is not required for the semantic correctness of the file

Filling in the field is not required for the semantic correctness of the file, nor is it required under the provisions of the Act (e.g. the PKWiU field in the Fa/FaWiersz element); on the other hand, it may be required under the provisions of other legal acts

Purchase invoices downloaded from the SmartKSeF portal in XML/PDF/HTML/JSON formats have the KSeF ID in the file name.
Sales invoices downloaded from the SmartKSeF portal in XML/PDF/HTML/JSON formats have SmartKSeF ID in the file name.
In the API documentation there is information about adding the X-KSEF ID header for purchase and sales invoices.
(https://developer.smartksef.exorigo-upos.pl/#tag/Invoices/operation/getInvoice / https://developer.smartksef.exorigo-upos.pl/#tag/Purchase-Invoices)
